name: Oracle Responsys Marketing Automation API
what_it_does: Oracle Responsys REST API for enterprise B2C marketing automation and cross-channel campaign management platform. Enables AI agents to manage customer list and audience segmentation data for targeted campaign execution, handle email campaign creation, scheduling, and delivery management for marketing automation, access real-time event trigger management for behavioral marketing and cart abandonment campaigns, retrieve campaign performance analytics and deliverability metrics for marketing optimization, handle mobile push notification and SMS campaign management for mobile marketing, access customer profile and preference center data for personalization, retrieve A/B testing and multivariate campaign data for marketing optimization, manage suppression list and unsubscribe data for CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance, handle dynamic content and personalization data for hyper-personalized messaging, and integrate marketing data with Oracle Commerce, CRM, and omnichannel customer experience platforms.
use_cases: Sending personalized campaigns from marketing automation agents
Triggering behavioral emails from customer journey agents
Segmenting audiences from customer analytics agents
Optimizing campaigns from A/B testing agents
not_for: B2B marketing without high-volume B2C email marketing focus
Simple transactional email without campaign management complexity
SMB without enterprise marketing automation scale
best_when: A large B2C retailer, travel company, or financial services firm using Oracle Responsys wants AI agents to automate campaign creation, audience segmentation, behavioral trigger management, personalization, and cross-channel campaign optimization.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Email marketing automation must comply with CAN-SPAM (US), CASL (Canada), and GDPR (EU) — automated email campaigns without unsubscribe/opt-out management and consent validation creates legal violations with financial penalties. Automated email sending without deliverability reputation management (bounce handling, spam trap avoidance) damages sender reputation and deliverability. SMS campaign automation must comply with TCPA requiring prior express written consent for marketing texts.

auth.notes: Oracle Responsys uses OAuth 2.0 (username/password grant for API). Documentation at Oracle Cloud docs. Austin, Texas (Oracle HQ). Oracle acquired Responsys (2013, $1.5B). Oracle Marketing Cloud includes Responsys (B2C), Eloqua (B2B), and BlueKai (data). REST API with JSON. Webhooks for campaign events. Strong in retail, CPG, travel, and financial services B2C marketing. Competes with Salesforce Marketing Cloud and Adobe Campaign for enterprise B2C marketing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Oracle Cloud subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual Oracle Cloud subscription; contact volume and feature tier pricing
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Oracle Corporation (ORCL NYSE). Oracle acquired Responsys (2013, $1.5B). Oracle Marketing Cloud platform. Responsys for B2C marketing; Eloqua for B2B. Strong in retail, travel, and financial services. Competes with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Campaign, and Braze for enterprise marketing automation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; Oracle service plan dependent

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Email marketing without CAN-SPAM/CASL/GDPR compliant unsubscribe and consent management creates legal violations; automated campaigns must enforce suppression list and consent records
TCPA for SMS — automated SMS marketing must have prior express written consent for each recipient; automated SMS without TCPA-compliant consent creates $500-$1,500 per-message statutory damages
Deliverability reputation management — bulk automated email sending without bounce handling, spam complaint monitoring, and warm-up scheduling damages sender reputation and deliverability
Oracle password grant flow — Responsys OAuth uses username/password grant (not standard Authorization Code); credentials must be securely managed and rotated
Responsys vs. Eloqua — Responsys is for B2C; Eloqua is for B2B; Oracle Marketing Cloud includes both; confirm which product serves your use case
Contact volume throttling — high-volume automated sends must respect Responsys rate limits and sending quotas to avoid account suspension
agent_readiness.security_notes: B2C marketing automation. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Customer contact and campaign data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marketing automation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Customer contact and marketing data.
